query: Sipariş numaram ORD-9871, aldığım buzdolabı maalesef 'damaged item' (hasarlı) geldi. Lütfen iade sürecini başlat ve işlemi 'full' tipinde tam para iadesi yapacak şekilde ayarla. İkisi de halledildikten sonra can@benimmail.com adresime konuyla ilgili 'Return and Refund Confirmation' (Onay) e-postası yolla.

tools.name: initiate_return
tools.description: Initiates a return process for a given order.

order_id.description: The unique identifier of the order.

tools.name: process_refund
tools.description: Processes a refund for a given order.

order_id.description: The unique identifier of the order.

refund_type.description: The type of refund to process.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Sends an email to a specified recipient.

recipient_email.description: The email address of the recipient.

subject.description: The subject line of the email.

body.description: The main content of the email.

tools.name: get_order_status
tools.description: Retrieves the current status of an order.

order_id.description: The unique identifier of the order.

answer: {"tool_calls": [{"name": "initiate_return", "arguments": {"order_id": "ORD-9871", "reason": "damaged item"}}, {"name": "process_refund", "arguments": {"order_id": "ORD-9871", "refund_type": "full"}}, {"name": "send_email", "arguments": {"recipient_email": "can@benimmail.com", "subject": "Return and Refund Confirmation", "body": "Your return for order ORD-9871 has been initiated due to a damaged item and a full refund has been processed."}}]}

query: Dijital cüzdanımda duran tüm nakit boş bakiye toplamını ('all available balance') anlık piyasa kuru üzerinden dolara (USD) çevir. Döviz dönüşümü başarılı sağlandıktan hemen sonra bu dolarları yurt dışındaki yüksek lisans okul harcımı ödemek üzere tanımlı 'EduPay' altyapısına transfer et.

tools.name: check_wallet_balance
tools.description: Checks the available floating cash reserve inside the virtual e-wallet.

tools.name: convert_currency
tools.description: Executes immediate market FX conversion utilizing whole cash volumes.

tools.name: transfer_to_institution
tools.description: Fires domestic or international wires specifically bound for verified enterprise pay portals.

tools.name: cancel_transaction
tools.description: Cancels an ongoing bank transaction order.

query: Spotify müzik kütüphanemde son '6 months' süreside dinlemediğim klasikleri özel olarak tespit et. Ardından parçaları ('forgotten favorites') 'Nostalji' klasörüne, gizli (private) bir çalma listemizde derleyecek aksiyon al ve uçuşum için çevrimdışı indirecek eylemi gönder.

tools.name: identify_forgotten_favorites
tools.description: Matches historically highly played audio tracks currently unused beyond specified timeframe boundaries.

tools.name: create_playlist
tools.description: Gathers designated track blobs cementing them into designated visible lists.

tools.name: download_playlist_offline
tools.description: Downloads songs of an album saving them entirely without data dependency.

tools.name: delete_playlist
tools.description: Deletes a specified playlist permanently.

query: Spor kulübü aboneliğim üzerinden 'tomorrow' tarihinde gerçekleşecek olan saat 18:00'daki 'Grup Pilates' dersine olan mevcut sınıf katılımımı iptal et. Derhal sıramı boşalt ki bekleyen ilk kişi alınsın; akabinde bana 'next Tuesday' (haftaya salı günü) aynı branştaki ders için yeni bir müsaitlik randevusu bak.

tools.name: cancel_class_attendance
tools.description: Forfeits class seating assignments scheduled for members.

tools.name: promote_waitlist
tools.description: Pushes pending gym members automatically covering dropped roster slots.

tools.name: search_class_availability
tools.description: Looks up matching fitness instructor availability tables targeting identical programs going forward.

tools.name: book_gym_class
tools.description: Reserves an open spot for a gym class.

query: 'solar panels' sistemindeki bataryaların şu anki genel şarj seviyesini kontrol et. Ardından şebekede biriken fazla enerjiyi 'home grid' üzerinden satışa aç ve 'electricity surplus' indirim tipini ekleyerek, 'account billing' idaresine 'surplus electricity sold applies discount' mesaj gönderim bildirimini yap.

tools.name: check_battery_level
tools.description: Reads the current charge level of energy storage systems.

tools.name: sell_excess_electricity
tools.description: Executes selling of surplus green energy back to the grid.

tools.name: apply_invoice_discount
tools.description: Credits an amount towards the next utility bill cycle.

tools.name: notify_finance
tools.description: Pushes an operations log to the billing or finance provider.

answer: {"tool_calls": [{"name": "check_battery_level", "arguments": {"device_type": "solar panels"}}, {"name": "sell_excess_electricity", "arguments": {"account": "home grid"}}, {"name": "apply_invoice_discount", "arguments": {"discount_type": "electricity surplus"}}, {"name": "notify_finance", "arguments": {"department": "account billing", "message": "surplus electricity sold applies discount"}}]}

query: Spor kulübüne tam giriş yapmadan önce, telefonumu otomatik olarak 'Odak' (Focus) moduna al, 'smart watch' üzerinden spor salonu kalp ritmi senkronizasyonu başlat ve 'gym turnstile' konumuna yetkili erişim giriş QR kodunu getir.

tools.name: enable_focus_mode
tools.description: Activates Do Not Disturb or Focus states on mobile hardware.

tools.name: start_continuous_heart_sync
tools.description: Starts streaming biometric metrics from wearable to linked gym equipment.

tools.name: generate_access_qr
tools.description: Generates a localized access token barcode for turnstiles.

tools.name: lock_screen
tools.description: Forces the device screen to turn off and lock.

query: Buzdolabının 'inside fridge' kamerasından ortam fotoğrafı çek ve 'fridge camera' kaynağı aracına incelet. İçerideki tüm ('analyzed fridge contents') ürünleri çıkartıp bana vegan yemek ('recipe suggestion') tarifi oluştur, bunu 'mobile phone' kısa mesajla yolla.

tools.name: capture_fridge_image
tools.description: Fires a snapshot from internal appliance diagnostic cameras.

tools.name: analyze_ingredients
tools.description: Scans food supply imagery yielding an array of edible components.

tools.name: suggest_recipe
tools.description: Generates culinary instructions bounded by dietary limitations.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Dispatches text alerts to phone destinations.

answer: {"tool_calls": [{"name": "capture_fridge_image", "arguments": {"camera_location": "inside fridge"}}, {"name": "analyze_ingredients", "arguments": {"image_source": "fridge camera"}}, {"name": "suggest_recipe", "arguments": {"diet_type": "vegan", "input_ingredients": "analyzed fridge contents"}}, {"name": "send_message", "arguments": {"recipient": "mobile phone", "content": "recipe suggestion"}}]}

query: Hava muhalefetini dikkate alarak 'tomorrow morning' olan uçuşumu uygulasından iptal et, hemen 'afternoon' sefere olan hızlı treni bul, 'Business' sınıfından satın al. Ek olarak ayarladığım 'airport shuttle' transfer hizmet aracını tamamen kaldır.

tools.name: cancel_flight
tools.description: Aborts and refunds a registered airline boarding pass.

tools.name: search_trains
tools.description: Searches locomotive networks for specific temporal windows.

tools.name: book_train
tools.description: Reserves high speed railway seats.

tools.name: cancel_transfer
tools.description: Cancels hired shuttle or limousine ground carriage operations.

query: Paylaşılan belgeler içerisinden 'weekly meeting notes' belge adındaki dosyanın özetini çıkar. Bu ürettiğin metni ('meeting summary') ortak Notion veritabanında ('Marketing') yeni bir sayfa (page) olarak işle, hem de 'managers' grubundakilere 'formal' bir e-posta bülteni ilet.

tools.name: extract_document_summary
tools.description: Opens a given text source generating a succinct wrap-up.

tools.name: create_notion_page
tools.description: Fires API hooks integrating new nodes directly into Notion structures.

tools.name: send_newsletter_email
tools.description: Blasts formatted HTML digests leveraging predefined audience tags.

tools.name: archive_document
tools.description: Archives a specific document to a designated secure sub-folder.

query: Arabanın merkez sistemine erişerek 'home' (evime) coğrafi uzaklık ayarı (Geofence) yap. Ekleyerek arabanın menzilinde 'heating system' 24 derece 'set to 24 degrees' isitsin ve yakınlaşınca 'garage door' aletini 'open' emriyle açtırsın.

tools.name: create_geofence_trigger
tools.description: Establishes an invisible digital perimeter bounded radially around coordinates.

tools.name: add_geofence_action
tools.description: Binds specific smart IoT routine commands onto an existing Geofence border.

tools.name: remove_geofence_trigger
tools.description: Removes an active geofence location trigger.

tools.name: get_current_location
tools.description: Acquires raw live GPS tracking telemetry.
